items.title: MirrorCode: Evidence AI can already do some weeks-long coding tasks
items.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Epoch AIとMETRが共同開発したMirrorCodeは長期コーディングベンチマーク。既にImport AI 453で複数回言及済み。concepts/swe-bench.mdへのreference追加が最適。
items.body_excerpt: MirrorCode: Evidence AI can already do some weeks-long coding tasks. We present early results from MirrorCode, a benchmark (co-developed with METR) of long-horizon coding tasks derived from real software applications.

items.title: GPT in 60 Lines of NumPy
items.body_excerpt: GPT in 60 Lines of NumPy. January 30, 2023. In this post, we'll implement a GPT from scratch in just 60 lines of numpy.

items.title: What's new in CPUs since the 80s?
items.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ x86 CPUの新機能解説。AI/LLM/エージェント技術との直接の関連性なし。過去もnon-AIで連続スキップ実績。
items.body_excerpt: What's new in CPUs since the 80s? This is a response to the following question from David Albert: My mental model of CPUs is stuck in the 1980s

items.title: Data, experts en politiek: een ongemakkelijke combinatie
items.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ オランダ語の政治・データ専門家に関する講演。AI/LLM技術との関連性薄。
items.body_excerpt: Data, experts en politiek: een ongemakkelijke combinatie. Een verbeterd transcript van een praatje gehouden op 24 april 2025 ter afsluiting van de "Datamaand" van de Tweede Kamer.

items.title: How Much Do GPU Clusters Really Cost?
items.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆☆ SemiAnalysisのGPUクラスタTCO分析。ClusterMAX 2.0関連内容は concepts/gpu-cloud-rankings.md と entities/semianalysis.md で既にカバー済み。
items.body_excerpt: How Much Do GPU Clusters Really Cost?
